description: An environmental consultant needs to assess the potential impact of a new solar project on local wildlife, particularly protected bird species.

nodes.task_description: Query federal and state databases to identify all protected or endangered species known to inhabit the project area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a list of 3 protected bird species.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the project layout to determine its proximity to critical habitats or migratory routes identified for these species.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the project site is adjacent to a known migratory flyway.

nodes.task_description: Recommend mitigation measures, such as adjusting the project boundary, using bird-friendly materials, and post-construction monitoring.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a list of actionable mitigation strategies.
